title: Archon + Jira: Drag a Ticket, Get a Pull Request (Live Build)
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates building a Jira adapter for Archon, an AI coding automation platform. The adapter enables ticket-driven workflows where Archon receives tasks from Jira, executes code fixes, creates pull requests, and reports results back to tickets.
